children.text: This slide outlines a specific issue or challenge relevant to the topic being discussed. The information is presented factually to ensure clarity and shared understanding before introducing potential insights or responses.

children.text: The content here is designed to orient the reader, clarify scope, and ensure a shared understanding before moving into deeper discussion or analysis.

children.name: text-1
children.text:
This slide provides a high-level summary of the section, outlining the main themes and topics 
that will be covered in more detail on subsequent slides.

children.name: text-1
children.text: This section contains more detailed explanatory content, similar to what would be included in training materials, strategy decks, or formal documentation. The purpose of this text is to demonstrate how longer-form information should be displayed across multiple paragraphs while maintaining clarity and visual balance.

children.name: text-1
children.text: Each paragraph represents a distinct idea or supporting explanation. This allows the layout to accommodate realistic content density and helps the AI agent learn how extended information is structured and presented within slides.

children.text: This slide summarises the main information presented previously. It reinforces understanding by restating key ideas in a concise and structured format without introducing new concepts.
